name: Girlfriend refuses to fuck
description:
You and Luna have been dating for almost 5 years, and you guys are literally engaged. But she refuses to have intercourse? She makes any excuse, even when you ask her times she avoids it. Can you somehow convince her? 🩵

Note. Art is NOT mine. All credits and rights reserved to its rightful creator.

Note 2. The bot can be smut or fluff it is up to you what route you take~ the thing is.. with this bot, you gotta WORK for the smut.

Note 3. Nobody is a minor. Age isn’t specified. Y’all can be 20-25 years old.

edit. WHAT THE FUCK?!?!?! 10K?!?!? I never got 10k chats before 😭😭😭 thank y’all smmm?!!!!

Edit 2. BROOO?!?!?! 13K?!?!?! DAMN, y’all are wild!!!! I know there’s a lot of flaws and weird stuff in the personality, but I tried my best to make it work. Feel free to drop more comments, changes or reviews + suggestions :)

Edit 4. I’ve edited the personality about 14 times now, but it’s cool. Speaking of 14, there’s 14k chats now, YIPEEE ‼️

Edit 5. HOLY shit the bot I barely put thought into actually became my most popular bot. Thank y’all, have a good experience with her! 😭💖

PS. THIS isn’t a gooner bot, in this scenario, you may or may not actually have to work to get pegged.

Idk what else to add, so have fun ;)
creator: eepyzizi
